channel.title: Unisoc (Shanghai) Technologies Co., Ltd. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Unisoc (Shanghai) Technologies Co., Ltd. (unisoc).

image.title: Unisoc (Shanghai) Technologies Co., Ltd. — recent CVEs

item.title: CVE-2025-71256 · 7.5 HIGH
item.description: In nr modem, there is a possible improper input validation. This could lead to remote denial of service with no additional execution privileges needed.

item.title: CVE-2025-71255 · 7.5 HIGH
item.description: In Modem IMS, there is a possible improper input validation. This could lead to remote denial of service with no additional execution privileges needed.

item.title: CVE-2025-71254 · 7.5 HIGH
item.description: In Modem IMS, there is a possible improper input validation. This could lead to remote denial of service with no additional execution privileges needed.

item.description: In Modem IMS, there is a possible improper input validation. This could lead to remote denial of service with no additional execution privileges needed.

item.title: CVE-2025-71252 · 7.5 HIGH
item.description: In Modem IMS, there is a possible improper input validation. This could lead to remote denial of service with no additional execution privileges needed.

item.title: CVE-2025-71251 · 7.5 HIGH
item.description: In IMS, there is a possible system crash due to improper input validation. This could lead to remote denial of service with no additional execution privileges needed.

item.description: In nr modem, there is a possible system crash due to improper input validation. This could lead to remote denial of service with no additional execution privileges needed.

item.title: CVE-2025-3012 · 7.5 HIGH
item.description: In dpc modem, there is a possible system crash due to null pointer dereference. This could lead to remote denial of service with no additional execution privileges needed

item.title: CVE-2025-11133 · 7.5 HIGH
item.description: In nr modem, there is a possible system crash due to improper input validation. This could lead to remote denial of service with no additional execution privileges needed

item.title: CVE-2025-11132 · 7.5 HIGH
item.description: In nr modem, there is a possible system crash due to improper input validation. This could lead to remote denial of service with no additional execution privileges needed

item.title: CVE-2025-11131 · 7.5 HIGH
item.description: In nr modem, there is a possible system crash due to improper input validation. This could lead to remote denial of service with no additional execution privileges needed

item.title: CVE-2025-31719 · 5.1 MEDIUM
item.description: In TEE EcDSA algorithm, there is a possible memory consistency issue. This could lead to generated incorrect signature results with low probability.

item.title: CVE-2025-31718 · 7.5 HIGH
item.description: In modem, there is a possible system crash due to improper input validation. This could lead to remote escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed.

item.title: CVE-2025-31717 · 7.5 HIGH
item.description: In modem, there is a possible system crash due to improper input validation. This could lead to remote denial of service with no additional execution privileges needed.

item.title: CVE-2022-38696 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: In BootRom, there's a possible missing payload size check. This could lead to memory buffer overflow without requiring additional execution privileges.

item.title: CVE-2022-38695 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: In BootRom, there's a possible unchecked command index. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed.

item.title: CVE-2022-38694 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: In BootRom, there is a possible unchecked write address. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed.

item.title: CVE-2022-38693 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: In FDL1, there is a possible missing payload size check. This could lead to memory buffer overflow without requiring additional execution privileges.

item.title: CVE-2022-38692 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: In BootROM, there is a missing size check for RSA keys in Certificate Type 0 validation. This could lead to memory buffer overflow without requiring additional execution privileges.

item.title: CVE-2022-38691 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: In BootROM, there is a possible missing validation for Certificate Type 0. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed.

item.title: CVE-2025-31715 · 9.8 CRITICAL
item.description: In vowifi service, there is a possible command injection due to improper input validation. This could lead to remote escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed.

item.title: CVE-2025-31714 · 6.8 MEDIUM
item.description: In Developer Tools, there is a possible missing verification incorrect input. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed.

item.title: CVE-2025-31713 · 8.4 HIGH
item.description: In engineer mode service, there is a possible command injection due to improper input validation. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed.

item.title: CVE-2025-31716 · 5.1 MEDIUM
item.description: In bootloader, there is a possible out of bounds write due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to local denial of service with no additional execution privileges needed.

item.title: CVE-2025-31712 · 5.1 MEDIUM
item.description: In cplog service, there is a possible out of bounds write due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to local denial of service with no additional execution privileges needed.

item.title: CVE-2025-31711 · 5.1 MEDIUM
item.description: In cplog service, there is a possible system crash due to null pointer dereference. This could lead to local denial of service with no additional execution privileges needed.

item.title: CVE-2025-31710 · 5.9 MEDIUM
item.description: In engineermode service, there is a possible command injection due to improper input validation. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed.

item.title: CVE-2024-39442 · 6.2 MEDIUM
item.description: In sprd ssense service, there is a possible missing permission check. This could lead to local information disclosure with no additional execution privileges needed.

item.title: CVE-2024-39441 · 7.1 HIGH
item.description: In wifi display, there is a possible missing permission check. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed.

item.title: CVE-2024-39440 · 6.2 MEDIUM
item.description: In DRM service, there is a possible system crash due to null pointer dereference. This could lead to local denial of service with System execution privileges needed.

item.title: CVE-2024-39439 · 6.2 MEDIUM
item.description: In DRM service, there is a possible out of bounds write due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to local denial of service with System execution privileges needed.

item.title: CVE-2024-39438 · 6.5 MEDIUM
item.description: In linkturbonative service, there is a possible command injection due to improper input validation. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with System execution privileges needed.

item.title: CVE-2024-39437 · 6.5 MEDIUM
item.description: In linkturbonative service, there is a possible command injection due to improper input validation. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with System execution privileges needed.

item.title: CVE-2024-39436 · 6.5 MEDIUM
item.description: In linkturbonative service, there is a possible command injection due to improper input validation. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with System execution privileges needed.

item.title: CVE-2024-39435 · 6.5 MEDIUM
item.description: In Logmanager service, there is a possible missing verification incorrect input. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed.

item.title: CVE-2024-39434 · 6.2 MEDIUM
item.description: In drm service, there is a possible out of bounds read due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to local denial of service with System execution privileges needed.
